CONFIDENTIAL - INTERNAL USE ONLY
Do Not Share Outside Legal & Executive Teams

NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT (NDA)

This agreement is entered into as of May 1, 2026, between CyberBase Corp ("Disclosing Party")
and Acme Ventures LLC ("Receiving Party").

The Receiving Party agrees not to disclose, reproduce, or use any confidential information
shared during the course of merger negotiations and acquisition due diligence.

Subject matter covered under this NDA includes, but is not limited to:
- Financial reports and revenue forecast for FY2026
- Product roadmap and unreleased features
- Payroll and compensation structures
- Source code, proprietary algorithms, and internal architecture

Private and Confidential. Breach of this NDA may result in immediate legal action.
Governing law: French jurisdiction, Paris Commercial Court.

Signed,
Legal Department - CyberBase Corp
